description:
Create a new Webpage reference in your Juris-M library for the '2023 Merger Guidelines' using the following details:

- Item Type: Webpage
- Title: 2023 Merger Guidelines
- Author: Federal Trade Commission (formatted as an institution)
- Website Title: Federal Trade Commission
- Date: 2023-12-18
- URL: https://www.ftc.gov/legal-library/browse/cases-proceedings/public-statements/merger-guidelines-2023

The task is complete when the item is saved in the library with the author correctly recorded as a single institutional field.
